/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++20 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/gbm_simulator.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbm_simulator.dir/src/cholesky.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbm_simulator.dir/src/statistics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gbm_simulator.dir/src/convergence_runner.cpp.o -o gbm_simulator
